description_long: This is a tall, intricately carved stone sculpture featuring a central standing human figure in classical drapery, set beneath an ornate architectural canopy. Above the main figure, there are two seated figures on either side, separated by a decorative arch and detailed relief work. The canopy is adorned with floral and geometric motifs, and the entire structure is highly detailed with deep reliefs and sculptural elements. The base of the sculpture is textured and appears to represent rocky or organic forms. The overall style suggests a historical or religious theme, with a strong vertical emphasis and a sense of grandeur. The sculpture is monochromatic, with a weathered, pale stone appearance.
description: A tall, ornate stone sculpture with a central draped human figure beneath an elaborate canopy, flanked by two seated figures and detailed relief carvings.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the central standing figure, the two seated figures above, and the full decorative canopy.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the relief, the profile of the figures, and the layered architectural elements.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate frontal view, similar to view 0 but with slightly different lighting and angle, showing the same main features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, displaying the profile of the sculpture and the three-dimensionality of the figures and canopy.
attribute_subject_matter: classical human figures beneath an ornate architectural canopy
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
